name: Classicpress With Mariadb
tagline: A lightweight, stable, instantly familiar free open-source content management system, based on WordPress without the block editor (Gutenberg).
description:
A lightweight, stable, instantly familiar free open-source content management system, based on WordPress without the block editor (Gutenberg).

Docs: https://www.classicpress.net/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  classicpress:
    image: classicpress/classicpress:latest
    volumes:
      - classicpress-files:/var/www/html
    environment:
      - CLASSICPRESS_DB_HOST=mariadb
      - CLASSICPRESS_DB_USER=u291f784bfd
      - CLASSICPRESS_DB_PASSWORD=ef9fb98a08eb271e1c93a32aeb7e876b
      - CLASSICPRESS_DB_NAME=classicpress
    depends_on:
      - mariadb
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42011:80
  mariadb:
    image: mariadb:11
    volumes:
      - mariadb-data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=ba79cc54a814eca0087bf08d6a6ff766
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=classicpress
      - MYSQL_USER=u291f784bfd
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=ef9fb98a08eb271e1c93a32aeb7e876b
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - healthcheck.sh
        - --connect
        - --innodb_initialized
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  classicpress-files: null
  mariadb-data: null
